scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields (name, type, base, summary, description, containers, resources with oci-image, assumes k8s-api). Includes a clean minimum viable example. Minor omission: does not include `platforms` field which gold standard lists as required, but otherwise fully correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields including charm-user, links, upstream-source, charm-entrypoint, charm-requirements, charm-libs, analysis.ignore.attributes are real charmcraft fields
